service.title: Customer Service
service.intro: Our team is available to answer your questions and assist you.

payment.question: What payment methods do you accept?
payment.answer: We accept bank cards (Visa, Mastercard), PayPal, and gift cards.

payment.question: Is online payment secure?
payment.answer: Yes, all transactions are protected by an SSL protocol and banking verification systems.

payment.question: Can I pay in installments?
payment.answer: We offer payment in 3 installments without fees through our financial partner.

payment.question: How do I use a promo code or gift card?
payment.answer: You can enter your promo code or gift card number during payment, before confirming the order.

orders.question: How do I place an order?
orders.answer: Add your products to the cart, validate your cart, then follow the payment and delivery steps.

orders.question: Can I modify or cancel my order?
orders.answer: Yes, as long as your order has not been shipped, you can modify or cancel it from your customer account.

orders.question: How do I know if my order is confirmed?
orders.answer: You will receive a confirmation email with the summary of your order.

orders.question: Can I order without creating an account?
orders.answer: Yes, it is possible to order as a guest, but we recommend creating an account to track your orders.

delivery.question: What are the delivery times?
delivery.answer: Standard delivery takes 2 to 5 business days. An express option is available within 24/48h.

delivery.question: Do you deliver internationally?
delivery.answer: Yes, we deliver to most countries. Delivery times and fees vary depending on the destination.

delivery.question: What are the delivery fees?
delivery.answer: Delivery fees are automatically calculated during payment based on weight and destination.

delivery.question: How can I track my order?
delivery.answer: A tracking number will be sent to you by email once your package has been shipped.

returns.question: Can I return a perfume if I don’t like it?
returns.answer: Yes, you have 14 days after receipt to make a return, provided the product is intact and unopened.

returns.question: How do I make a return or exchange?
returns.answer: Log in to your customer account, select the relevant order, and follow the return instructions.

returns.question: Are return costs at my expense?
returns.answer: Return costs are free if the product is defective or non-compliant. Otherwise, they are at your expense.

returns.question: When will I be refunded after a return?
returns.answer: The refund is made within 7 business days after receipt and verification of the returned product.

newsletter.title: Subscribe to the MyPerfume newsletter
newsletter.prg: Get a preview of the good deals & news.

TextInfo.infoVI: Protection of property and persons – Use of personal data
TextInfo.p: In accordance with the provisions of Articles 6-III and 19 of Law No. 2004-575 of June 21, 2004 on Confidence in the Digital Economy (L.C.E.N.), we inform visitors to the website: https://nesrinebekkar.com of the following information:
TextInfo.pII: The founder of the website and the publication director is:
TextInfo.pII1: How to contact the publication manager:
TextInfo.pr: Registered office: 61 Lordou Vironos Street, 6023 Larnaca, Cyprus
TextInfo.pr2: Contactable via the following link: https://www.hostinger.fr/contact.
TextInfo.prI: Any internet user who connects to and uses the website
TextInfo.prII: is considered a user of the website
TextInfo.prIIII: offers several services, as is, available to users. Users are required to act honestly and in good faith towards other users and the website developer.
TextInfo.prIIII1: The website is regularly updated by
TextInfo.pIIII: Perfume Algarve Shops strives to provide the most accurate information possible on the website nesrinebekkar.com (subject to changes made since publication), but cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or relevance of the information provided, whether caused by itself or not. Consequently, users acknowledge that they use this information at their own responsibility.
TextInfo.pIIIII: The website is generally accessible to users 24/7, except in cases of scheduled or unscheduled maintenance, or force majeure. In case of service unavailability
TextInfo.pT1: will make every effort to restore access to the website and will attempt to inform users in advance of the dates and times of the interruption. Being bound only by an obligation of means,
TextInfo.pT2: cannot be held responsible for damages of any kind resulting from service unavailability.
TextInfo.pT3: is the exclusive owner of all intellectual property rights or holds usage rights over all elements accessible on the website, including structure, texts, articles, graphics, icons, sound files, and software.
TextInfo.pT4: Any total or partial reproduction of the website
TextInfo.pT5: display, publication, or adaptation of any of these elements, by any means or process, is prohibited without prior written authorization from
TextInfo.pT6: Otherwise, it will be considered an infringement and subject to prosecution under Articles L.335-2 and following of the Intellectual Property Code.
TextInfo.pT7: In France, personal data is protected in particular by Law No. 78-87 of January 6, 1978, Law No. 2004-801 of August 6, 2004, Article L.226-13 of the Penal Code, and the European Directive of October 24, 1995.
TextInfo.pT9: may contain hyperlinks to other websites published and managed by third parties. The publisher cannot be held liable, directly or indirectly, if such third-party websites fail to comply with legal requirements.
TextInfo.pT10: does not collect personal information (in accordance with Article 4 of Law No. 78-17 of January 6, 1978) except for the purposes of certain services offered by the website.
TextInfo.pT11: Users provide this data knowingly, particularly when entering it themselves. Users are informed
TextInfo.pT12: whether providing such information is mandatory or optional. In accordance with Articles 38 and following of Law No. 78-17 of January 6, 1978 relating to data processing, files, and freedoms, any user has the right to access, rectify, delete, and oppose personal data concerning them. To exercise this right, send your request to
TextInfo.pTT14: or by signed handwritten letter, including a copy of a valid ID with the holder’s signature and the address to which the response should be sent.
TextInfo.pT14: No personal information of the website user
TextInfo.pT15: will be published without the user's knowledge, exchanged, transferred, or sold to any third party. Only in the event of the acquisition of the website
TextInfo.pT16: and all its rights does this allow
TextInfo.pT17: the transfer of such information to the buyer, who will be bound by the same obligations regarding data protection and modification.
TextInfo.pT19: Databases are protected by the provisions of the Law of July 1, 1998 transposing Directive 96/9 of March 11, 1996 on the legal protection of databases.

about.title: Who are we?
about.paragraph1: Our story begins with a friendship. Friends for over ten years, we share a common passion for the world of perfume and the elegance it represents.
about.paragraph2: This passion has grown over time through discussions, discoveries, and a constant curiosity for scents and their evocative power.
about.paragraph3: Over the years, the idea of creating our own perfume business became obvious. We wanted to build a place where each fragrance is carefully selected.
about.paragraph4: Our approach is based on a rigorous selection of perfumes that stand out for their character, subtlety, and quality.
about.paragraph5: We believe perfume reveals identity, accompanies life’s important moments, and leaves a lasting impression.
about.paragraph6: Today, our brand reflects our friendship, our complementarity, and our shared ambition.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This page explains how our website uses cookies to improve your experience and ensure the proper functioning of the service.
cookies.modify: You can change your preferences at any time using the “Manage my cookies” button at the bottom of the page.
cookies.pI: These cookies allow you to save your choices (language, theme, browsing preferences). They improve your user experience.
cookies.pref_desc: These cookies store your choices (language, theme, browsing preferences). They enhance your user experience.
cookies.pII: These cookies allow you to save your choices (language, theme, browsing preferences). They improve your user experience.
cookies.analytics_title: Analytics cookies: understand how the site is used.
cookies.analytics_desc: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with the website to improve its performance.
cookies.necessary_desc: These cookies are essential for the website to function properly and cannot be disabled.
cookies.audience_desc: These cookies help us measure traffic and performance to improve our services.
cookies.develop_desc: These cookies are used for debugging, testing, and improving the website during development.

CGV.title: Terms and Conditions of Sale
CGV.article1Text: These Terms and Conditions of Sale govern the sale of perfumes made on the website https://perfumealgarve.com.
CGV.article2Text: The products offered are authentic perfumes. Descriptions are as accurate as possible. Photos are non-contractual.
CGV.article3Text: Prices are shown in euros (€), all taxes included (VAT). Shipping fees are displayed before order confirmation.
CGV.article4Text: Any order placed on the website implies acceptance of these Terms and Conditions. A confirmation email is sent after payment validation.
CGV.article5Text: Payment is secure and can be made by credit card or any other method offered on the website.
CGV.article6Text: Products are delivered to the address provided when placing the order. Delivery times are given for information purposes only.
CGV.article7Text1: In accordance with the law, the customer has a period of 14 days to withdraw.
CGV.article7Text2: Opened or unsealed perfumes cannot be returned for hygiene and health protection reasons.
CGV.article8Text: Products must be returned unopened and in their original packaging. Refunds are issued within 14 days after receipt.
CGV.article9Text: The seller cannot be held liable for indirect damages related to the use of the products or the website.
CGV.article10Text: These Terms and Conditions are governed by French law. Any dispute falls under the jurisdiction of French courts.
